description: ALP-001 Project Roadmap — 10 interconnected projects that gradually build one production-grade cloud platform. Each project extends the previous one. The learner builds a real portfolio.
principle: Projects are never isolated. Each extends the previous. The learner builds one production cloud platform over the entire academy.

projects.name: CloudNova Linux Server
projects.tagline: Provision and harden your first production server
projects.story: You've joined CloudNova as a Junior Cloud Engineer. Your first task: provision and secure the company's new Linux application server.
acceptance_criteria: SSH accessible only via key authentication
Firewall blocks all ports except 22, 80, 443
Unattended security upgrades enabled
Fail2ban configured and running
Server documentation is clear and complete

projects.name: CloudNova Secure Network
projects.tagline: Design and secure the corporate network
projects.story: The server from Project 1 needs network connectivity. Design a secure VNet with proper subnetting, DNS, and network security for CloudNova's growing infrastructure.
objectives: Design a VNet with proper subnetting (CIDR)
acceptance_criteria: VNet has proper subnet isolation (public/private/dmz)
DNS resolves internal and external names
NSGs enforce least-privilege network access
Load balancer distributes traffic to Proj-001 server
HTTPS terminates with valid TLS certificate
Network diagram is accurate and clear

projects.name: CloudNova Automation Engine
projects.story: Manual server management doesn't scale. Build Python automation scripts to manage CloudNova's infrastructure — health checks, backups, and provisioning.
objectives: Write Python scripts for server health monitoring
Build a CLI tool for common operations
Write unit tests for all automation
acceptance_criteria: Health checks run every 5 minutes and log results
Backups run daily with 7-day retention
CLI tool has --help for all commands
All scripts have error handling and logging
Test coverage exceeds 80%
Code follows PEP 8 style guide

projects.name: CloudNova Azure Landing Zone
projects.tagline: Provision production Azure infrastructure with Terraform
projects.story: CloudNova is moving to Azure. As the Cloud Engineer, design and provision the entire Azure landing zone — networking, compute, storage, identity — all as code with Terraform.
objectives: Write Terraform modules for networking, compute, storage
Set up CI/CD for Terraform (GitHub Actions)
acceptance_criteria: All Azure resources are provisioned via Terraform (no manual steps)
Remote state stored in Azure Storage with locking
CI/CD pipeline runs terraform plan on PR, apply on merge
All resources are properly tagged
Cost estimation runs on every PR
Modules are reusable and documented

projects.name: CloudNova Container Platform
projects.story: The automation scripts from Project 3 need to run as containerized services. Package them as Docker containers, push to Azure Container Registry, and deploy to the landing zone.
objectives: Write production Dockerfiles for all automation services
Implement multi-stage builds for image optimization
Push images to Azure Container Registry
Deploy containers to Azure Container Instances
Set up container monitoring and logging
acceptance_criteria: Multi-stage builds reduce image size by >50%
Images scanned and free of critical vulnerabilities
Containers auto-restart on failure
Logs stream to Azure Monitor
Health probes configured for all containers

projects.name: CloudNova Kubernetes Production Cluster
projects.tagline: Deploy production Kubernetes on the Azure landing zone
projects.story: Container Instances worked for starters, but CloudNova needs orchestration. Deploy an AKS cluster with proper networking, RBAC, monitoring, and deploy the containerized services.
objectives: Deploy all containerized services to K8s
Set up ingress with TLS termination
acceptance_criteria: AKS cluster provisioned entirely via Terraform
Network Policies enforce pod-to-pod isolation
RBAC restricts access per namespace
All services accessible via HTTPS ingress
HPA scales based on CPU/memory metrics
Cluster passes CIS benchmark scan

projects.name: CloudNova GitOps Delivery Pipeline
projects.tagline: Implement GitOps with ArgoCD for continuous delivery
projects.story: Manual kubectl apply won't cut it anymore. Implement GitOps: all Kubernetes configs live in Git, ArgoCD syncs them automatically, and every change goes through PR review.
objectives: Install and configure ArgoCD on AKS
Implement automated sync and drift detection
Set up secrets management with External Secrets Operator
acceptance_criteria: All K8s resources synced from Git via ArgoCD
PR merge triggers automatic sync
Drift is detected and alerted within 3 minutes
Secrets are never stored in plain text in Git
Rollback is as simple as git revert

projects.name: CloudNova Observability Platform
projects.tagline: Full-stack observability for the production platform
projects.story: Production is running but you can't see inside. Deploy Prometheus, Grafana, Loki, and Tempo — the complete observability stack — with dashboards, alerts, and SLO tracking.
objectives: Create Grafana dashboards for all services
Set up Loki for log aggregation
Define SLIs, SLOs, and error budgets
acceptance_criteria: All services emit metrics to Prometheus
Dashboards show RED metrics (Rate, Errors, Duration)
Logs are queryable via Grafana Loki
Distributed traces visible across services
Alerts fire within SLA and route to correct team
SLOs are tracked with burn rate alerts

projects.name: CloudNova AI Inference Platform
projects.tagline: Deploy production AI services on your cloud platform
projects.story: CloudNova is launching AI features. Deploy LLM inference, vector search, and RAG pipelines on the Kubernetes platform — with the same GitOps, observability, and security standards.
objectives: Deploy LLM inference endpoints on AKS
Implement RAG pipeline as a microservice
Implement AI guardrails and content safety
deliverables: Vector DB deployment and indexing pipeline
acceptance_criteria: LLM inference scales to handle 100+ concurrent requests
Vector search returns results under 100ms p95
RAG pipeline achieves >90% answer relevance
Token usage and cost tracked per request
Content safety blocks harmful inputs/outputs
GPU utilization is monitored and optimized

projects.name: CloudNova Production Platform
projects.tagline: One platform to rule them all — your capstone project
projects.story: Integrate all previous projects into one unified production platform. This is your capstone — the thing you'll show in interviews. One `terraform apply` provisions everything. One GitOps repo manages it all. One observability stack monitors it all.
objectives: Integrate all 9 previous projects into one platform
Create a single terraform apply that provisions everything
Unified GitOps repository with all applications
Complete architecture diagram of the entire platform
Create a polished case study and demo
acceptance_criteria: Single `terraform apply` provisions the entire platform
ArgoCD manages all applications from one GitOps repo
Complete observability: metrics, logs, traces for everything
Platform passes security and compliance scans
Case study demonstrates business value and technical decisions
Portfolio README is interview-ready
